# Book 1 Sequence Plan (NSAS Sample)

## Chapter Function Map

| Chapter | Dominant Function | Secondary Function |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 01 | grounding | disturbance |
| 02 | disturbance | concealment |
| 03 | widening | echo |
| 04 | doubling | relay |
| 05 | fracture | route_expansion |
| 06 | echo | memory_return |
| 07 | convergence | cost |
| 08 | revelation | aftermath |

## Motion Framework

- Pattern: `ground -> disturb -> widen -> complicate -> fracture -> scatter -> converge -> transform`
- Pacing profile:
  - expansion: chapters 1-2, 4, 7
  - contraction: chapters 3, 5, 6
  - stabilization: chapter 8

## Thread Cadence Examples

- `book1-continuity-survival`
  - intro: chapter 01
  - recurrence: every chapter
  - latent windows: none
  - payoff: chapter 08
- `book1-red-river-route-setting`
  - intro: chapter 01
  - recurrence: every 2 chapters
  - latent windows: chapters 02, 04, 06
  - convergence: chapters 07-08
- `book1-philosophy-reading-signs`
  - intro: chapter 01
  - recurrence: every 2 chapters
  - reinterpretation windows: chapters 03, 05, 07

## Route Cadence

- `natchitoches`
  - direct presence: chapters 01, 03, 06
  - indirect presence: chapters 02, 04, 05, 07
- `lower-river-market`
  - direct presence: chapter 04
  - indirect rumor/trade mentions: chapters 02, 03, 05, 07
- `atchafalaya-fork`
  - direct presence: chapter 05
  - indirect warning signals: chapters 03, 06, 08

## Recall / Reframing Examples

- Anchor: lineage-knot gesture (chapter 01)
  - recall window: chapters 03-04
  - reinterpretation window: chapters 06-07 from alternate POV
- Anchor: market-rumor split testimony (chapter 02)
  - recall window: chapter 05
  - reinterpretation window: chapter 07 convergence chapter

## Convergence Planning

- Delayed key cluster A (`route-pressure-cluster`) seeded in chapters 01-03
- Delayed key cluster B (`warning-pattern-knot`) seeded in chapters 02-05
- Both clusters converge in chapter 07, then reframe in chapter 08

## Expansion / Contraction Pattern

- Expansion arcs:
  - chapter 01 -> 02 (world widening under subtle threat)
  - chapter 06 -> 07 (rapid convergence)
- Contraction arcs:
  - chapter 03 (interpretive narrowing)
  - chapter 05 -> 06 (fracture compression and memory lock-in)
